tasks.label: Build ARM ASM
tasks.command: $p = Get-Process qemu-system-arm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { $p | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Arm GNU Toolchain arm-none-eabi\14.2 rel1\bin\arm-none-eabi-as.exe' -g "${workspaceFolder}\arm\add_arm.s" -o "${workspaceFolder}\arm\build\add_arm.o"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Arm GNU Toolchain arm-none-eabi\14.2 rel1\bin\arm-none-eabi-ld.exe' -T "${workspaceFolder}\arm\linker.ld" -e Reset_Handler "${workspaceFolder}\arm\build\add_arm.o" -o "${workspaceFolder}\arm\build\add_arm.elf"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; exit 0

tasks.label: Build ARM ASM (debug)
tasks.command: $p = Get-Process qemu-system-arm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { $p | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Arm GNU Toolchain arm-none-eabi\14.2 rel1\bin\arm-none-eabi-as.exe' --defsym DEBUG_BUILD=1 -g "${workspaceFolder}\arm\add_arm.s" -o "${workspaceFolder}\arm\build\add_arm.o"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Arm GNU Toolchain arm-none-eabi\14.2 rel1\bin\arm-none-eabi-ld.exe' -T "${workspaceFolder}\arm\linker.ld" -e Reset_Handler "${workspaceFolder}\arm\build\add_arm.o" -o "${workspaceFolder}\arm\build\add_arm.elf"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; exit 0

tasks.label: Start ARM QEMU (gdb server)
tasks.command: $p = Get-Process qemu-system-arm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { $p | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'QEMU_READY'; & 'C:\Program Files\qemu\qemu-system-arm.exe' -M lm3s6965evb -nographic -kernel "${workspaceFolder}\arm\build\add_arm.elf" -semihosting-config enable=on,target=native -S -s

tasks.label: Stop ARM QEMU
tasks.command: $p = Get-Process qemu-system-arm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { $p | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0
